info.english_meaning: to grow to rise to escalate to accumulate
info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: ayaM DAtuH sidDAntakOmudyAM na dfSyate  kzIrataraNgiRyAm 4.152 stUpa ityasya vyAKyAne 'stupa iti durgaH' iti ayaM DAtuH nirdizwaH asti
